description: Legal document(s) in Arabic script. Recto involves Bū ʿImrān b. Bū l-Faraj b. Mardūkh al-Ṣayrafī, then refers to an administrator of a compound (mutawallī al-rabʿ), then might refer to all the houses pertaining to 'the waqf' (=the qodesh?) in Qaṣr al-Rūm/Qaṣr al-Shamʿ. Verso seems to be a different document, but probably related. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
